/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgtest_main.so -o ../lib/libgtest_main.so CMakeFiles/gtest_main.dir/src/gtest_main.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ai-lab/Downloads/DRL-robot-navigation_segway_imu_should_be_calibrated/DRL-robot-navigation/catkin_ws/build_isolated/realsense_gazebo_plugin/gtest/lib ../lib/libgtest.so -lpthread
